lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਕੈ ਰਹਨਿ ਸਚਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vichahu aap gavaae kai rehan sach liv laae |
lines.english: They eradicate selfishness and conceit from within; they remain lovingly absorbed in the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਤਿਨਾ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee na sevio tinaa birathaa janam gavaae |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋ ਸਿਰੁ ਲੇਖੈ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve aapanaa so sir lekhai laae |
lines.english: Those who serve their True Guru are certified and accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo tis bhaavai so kare kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord does just as He pleases. No one has any say in this. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਵੇਕਾਰੀ ਵੇੜਿਆ ਵੇਕਾਰਾ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man vekaaree verriaa vekaaraa karam kamaae |
lines.english: With the mind encircled by wickedness and evil, people do evil deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਪੂਜਦੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae agiaanee poojade daragah milai sajaae |
lines.english: The ignorant worship the love of duality; in the Lord's Court they shall be punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਦੇਉ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatam deo poojeeai bin satigur boojh na paae |
lines.english: So worship the Lord, the Light of the soul; without the True Guru, understanding is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕਾ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam bhaanaa satiguroo kaa karamee palai paae |
lines.english: Meditation, penance and austere self-discipline are found by surrendering to the True Guru's Will. By His Grace this is received.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sevaa surat kamaavanee jo har bhaavai so thaae paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, serve with this intuitive awareness; only that which is pleasing to the Lord is approved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man mere jit sadaa sukh hovai din raatee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind; it will bring you eternal peace, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਲਹਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man mere jit simarat sabh kilavikh paap lahaatee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind; meditating on it, all sins and misdeeds shall be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man mere mukh guramukh preet lagaatee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind; as Gurmukh, declare your love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਸਭ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu man mere jit daalad dukh bhukh sabh leh jaatee |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind; through it, all poverty, pain and hunger shall be removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਤੀ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jit mukh bhaag likhiaa dhur saachai har tith mukh naam japaatee |13|
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon his forehead by the True Lord, chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕੀਤੋ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee na sevio sabad na keeto veechaar |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru, and who do not contemplate the Word of the Shabad

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਮਿਰਤਕੁ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar giaan na aaeo miratak hai sansaar |
lines.english: -spiritual wisdom does not enter into their hearts; they are like dead bodies in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫੇਰੁ ਪਇਆ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh fer peaa mar jamai hoe khuaar |
lines.english: They go through the cycle of 8.4 million reincarnations, and they are ruined through death and rebirth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa so kare jis no aap karaae soe |
lines.english: He alone serves the True Guru, whom the Lord Himself inspires to do so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich naam nidhaan hai karam paraapat hoe |
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam is within the True Guru; by His Grace, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਸਿਉ ਤਿਨ ਸਚੀ ਸਦਾ ਲਿਵ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach rate gurasabad siau tin sachee sadaa liv hoe |
lines.english: Those who are truly attuned to the Word of the Guru's Shabad-their love is forever True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੇਲੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jis no mele na vichhurrai sehaj samaavai soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are united with Him shall not be separated again. They merge imperceptibly into God. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat raakhai ikat ghar aanai |
lines.english: He restrains his wandering mind, and brings it back to its own home within the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee aap pachhaanai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he is self-realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਭਗਉਤੀ ਜੋੁ ਭਗਵੰਤੈ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: so bhgautee jo bhagavantai jaanai |
lines.english: One who knows the Benevolent Lord God is the true devotee of Bhagaautee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sach samaavai soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, he merges into the True One. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai har naam vakhaanai |
lines.english: He remains dead while yet alive, and he chants the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਭਗਉਤੀ ਉਤਮੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa bhgautee utam hoe |
lines.english: Such a Bhagaautee is most exalted.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: par nindaa kare antar mal laae |
lines.english: He slanders others, and pollutes himself with his own filth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਪਟੁ ਭਗਉਤੀ ਕਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar kapatt bhgautee kahaae |
lines.english: He is full of deceit, and yet he calls himself a devotee of Bhagaautee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd paarabraham kade na paae |
lines.english: Through hypocrisy, he shall never attain the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਬਾਦੁ ਰਚਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat siau baad rachaae |
lines.english: He argues with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਮਲੁ ਧੋਵੈ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: baahar mal dhovai man kee jootth na jaae |
lines.english: Outwardly, he washes off the filth, but the impurity of his mind does not go away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har naam na chetai bahu karam kamaae |
lines.english: He does not remember the Name of the Lord, but still, he performs all sorts of empty rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਦੁਖੀਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਰਚਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: anadin dukheea doojai bhaae rachaae |
lines.english: Night and day, he suffers, engrossed in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa su mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: That which is pre-ordained cannot be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਸੇ ਕੜਿ ਨ ਸਵਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee dhiaaeaa se karr na savaahee |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the True Guru shall not be burnt to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਮੋਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak bin satigur seve mokh na paae |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without serving the True Guru, liberation is not obtained. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਡਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee dhiaaeaa tin jam ddar naahee |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the True Guru are not afraid of the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਸੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee dhiaaeaa se tripat aghaahee |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the True Guru are satisfied and fulfilled.
